author: priya.nair
message:
Replace in-memory LRU cache with Redis in payment service

Our in-memory cache doesn't survive pod restarts and isn't shared across replicas, which caused stale pricing data during the Black Friday load test. Redis gives us a shared, persistent cache across all payment-service replicas.

Refs: PAY-102

author: priya.nair
message:
Add Redis connection pooling and health check for payment cache

Follow-up to a1b2c3d. Adds a health check endpoint so k8s can detect Redis connection issues before they cause payment failures.

author: wei.zhang
message:
Implement orders table schema on Postgres

See RFC-004 for the datastore decision. Uses a normalized schema with foreign keys to customers and products tables, since we need transactional guarantees on order state transitions.

Refs: ORD-58

author: wei.zhang
message: Add indices on orders.customer_id and orders.status for dashboard query performance

author: amara.okafor
message:
Add JWT-based authentication to auth service

Replaces session-cookie auth ahead of the mobile app launch, since cookies don't work cleanly for native mobile clients.

Refs: SEC-33

author: amara.okafor
message:
Add refresh token rotation to auth service

Short-lived access tokens (15 min) needed a refresh flow so users aren't forced to re-login constantly. Rotation on each refresh reduces replay-attack window if a refresh token leaks.

Refs: SEC-33

author: amara.okafor
message:
Add rate limiting on login attempts (5 attempts / 15 min per account)

Following the credential-stuffing attempt flagged in SEC-33, capping login attempts per account to slow down brute-force attacks. Limit chosen to match OWASP's general guidance; open to revisiting if it causes support tickets from legitimate users.

Refs: SEC-33

author: tom.harrison
message:
Extract billing logic into standalone billing-service (phase 1 of monolith split)

See RFC-007. Billing is the first extraction target since it has the clearest data boundary and the least cross-module coupling.

Refs: ARCH-12

author: tom.harrison
message:
Extract notifications logic into standalone notifications-service (phase 2 of monolith split)

Refs: ARCH-12

author: tom.harrison
message:
Add circuit breaker between billing-service and notifications-service

After the Oct 2 incident where a notifications-service slowdown cascaded into billing timeouts, adding a circuit breaker so billing degrades gracefully instead of failing outright.

Refs: ARCH-19

author: sofia.moretti
message: Refactor calculate_discount() to support stacked promo codes

author: sofia.moretti
message: Update checkout-service to call new calculate_discount() signature

author: sofia.moretti
message: Update invoice-service to call new calculate_discount() signature
